author: Diego Caballero
Diego Caballero
patch:
commit 0043ec1e53a4d7184471342a729979066d0b6c8c
Author: Diego Caballero <dcaballero@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Mar 13 22:50:34 2026 +0000

    [LLVM-FIX] Breaking commit 5a4a5db4776f - 2026-02-24
    
    Fix breakage caused by LLVM commit:
        commit 5a4a5db4776f50a43624392eb2e18863504e5372
        Author: Mehdi Amini <joker.eph@gmail.com>
        Date:   Tue Feb 24 17:50:38 2026 +0100
    
            [MLIR] Remove deprecated setting usePropertiesForAttributes (#182327)
---
 cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake                          | 2 +-
 include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Dialect.td | 1 -
 2 files changed, 1 insertion(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
index bc67bd1..2d1a9d1 100644
--- a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
+++ b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ macro(download_llvm_sources)
   include(FetchContent)
 
   set(LLVM_GIT_REPO "https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git")
-  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH b82c7fc65229c8b2b6a964f023f6ec59b3cf9210)
+  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH 5a4a5db4776f50a43624392eb2e18863504e5372)
   message(STATUS "Downloading LLVM sources from ${LLVM_GIT_REPO}@${LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH} to ${LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}")
 
   # Set FetchContent directories. SOURCE_DIR and BINARY_DIR and SUBBUILD_DIR
diff --git a/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Dialect.td b/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Dialect.td
index dbb266e..ceb81f7 100644
--- a/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Dialect.td
+++ b/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Dialect.td
@@ -38,7 +38,6 @@ def CudaTile_Dialect : Dialect {
 
   let useDefaultTypePrinterParser = 1;
   let useDefaultAttributePrinterParser = 1;
-  let usePropertiesForAttributes = 1;
 
   let extraClassDeclaration = [{
     template <typename... OpTys>

author: Brunno Goldstein
Diego Caballero
patch:
commit 74722cf74b55c06500cfb46660ccad89f9160127
Author: Diego Caballero <dcaballero@nvidia.com>
Date:   Sat Feb 21 00:28:28 2026 +0000

    [LLVM-FIX] Breaking commit b82c7fc65229 - 2026-02-20
    
    Fix breakage caused by LLVM commit:
        commit b82c7fc65229c8b2b6a964f023f6ec59b3cf9210
        Author: Alexis Engelke <engelke@in.tum.de>
        Date:   Fri Feb 20 12:07:18 2026 +0100
    
            [CMake][LLVM] Add PCH infrastructure and LLVMSupport PCH (#176420)
---
 cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake | 5 ++++-
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
index 23ee44c..7ffbc8e 100644
--- a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
+++ b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ macro(download_llvm_sources)
   include(FetchContent)
 
   set(LLVM_GIT_REPO "https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git")
-  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH 34eb59dd4bb26cab248cc3a29b57b8dbe8d46849)
+  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH b82c7fc65229c8b2b6a964f023f6ec59b3cf9210)
   message(STATUS "Downloading LLVM sources from ${LLVM_GIT_REPO}@${LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH} to ${LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}")
 
   # Set FetchContent directories. SOURCE_DIR and BINARY_DIR and SUBBUILD_DIR
@@ -80,6 +80,9 @@ macro(configure_llvm_from_sources)
   set(LLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS "mlir" CACHE STRING "")
   # No need to build any LLVM targets.
   set(LLVM_TARGETS_TO_BUILD "" CACHE STRING "")
+  # Disable PCH to avoid flag mismatches between LLVM and CUDA Tile targets
+  # (e.g. NDEBUG differences).
+  set(CMAKE_DISABLE_PRECOMPILE_HEADERS ON)
   # Propagate ccache setting to LLVM build.
   if(CUDA_TILE_ENABLE_CCACHE)
     set(LLVM_CCACHE_BUILD ON CACHE BOOL "")

author: Diego Caballero
patch:
commit 2d2039a8d84d9a068cfdd143e8af35965721f704
Author: Diego Caballero <dcaballero@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Feb 11 19:42:00 2026 +0000

    [LLVM-FIX] Breaking commit 34eb59dd4bb2 - 2026-02-11
    
    Fix breakage caused by LLVM commit:
        commit 34eb59dd4bb26cab248cc3a29b57b8dbe8d46849
        Author: Matthias Springer <me@m-sp.org>
        Date:   Wed Feb 11 17:59:20 2026 +0100
    
            [mlir][IR][NFC] Simplify "splat" handling in `DenseIntOrFPElementsAttr` (#180965)
---
 cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake                | 2 +-
 lib/Bytecode/Reader/BytecodeReader.cpp | 3 +--
 2 files changed, 2 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
index c5be9bf..23ee44c 100644
--- a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
+++ b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ macro(download_llvm_sources)
   include(FetchContent)
 
   set(LLVM_GIT_REPO "https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git")
-  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH 3d7018c70b97e6a3d6dfe08e9f11dede96242d1f)
+  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH 34eb59dd4bb26cab248cc3a29b57b8dbe8d46849)
   message(STATUS "Downloading LLVM sources from ${LLVM_GIT_REPO}@${LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH} to ${LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}")
 
   # Set FetchContent directories. SOURCE_DIR and BINARY_DIR and SUBBUILD_DIR
diff --git a/lib/Bytecode/Reader/BytecodeReader.cpp b/lib/Bytecode/Reader/BytecodeReader.cpp
index 490b673..824890a 100644
--- a/lib/Bytecode/Reader/BytecodeReader.cpp
+++ b/lib/Bytecode/Reader/BytecodeReader.cpp
@@ -927,8 +927,7 @@ public:
     ArrayRef<char> rawData(reinterpret_cast<const char *>(rawUint8Data.data()),
                            rawUint8Data.size());
     // Validate the buffer size and format.
-    bool isSplat = false;
-    if (!DenseElementsAttr::isValidRawBuffer(tileType, rawData, isSplat))
+    if (!DenseElementsAttr::isValidRawBuffer(tileType, rawData))
       return reader.emitError() << "failed to validate buffer size and format";
 
     DenseElementsAttr attr = nullptr;

patch:
commit 802d9378800a3b7c9f88875206e84b2746d6991b
Author: Diego Caballero <dcaballero@nvidia.com>

    Remove Nvidia proprietary license
    
    This MR removes Nvidia proprietary license from
    cmake/IncludeCompilerChecks.cmake to align it with
    the rest of unlicensed cmake files.
---
 cmake/IncludeCompilerChecks.cmake | 10 ----------
 1 file changed, 10 deletions(-)

diff --git a/cmake/IncludeCompilerChecks.cmake b/cmake/IncludeCompilerChecks.cmake
index 50c5da7..6072d62 100644
--- a/cmake/IncludeCompilerChecks.cmake
+++ b/cmake/IncludeCompilerChecks.cmake
@@ -1,13 +1,3 @@
-# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
-# SPDX-License-Identifier: LicenseRef-NvidiaProprietary
-#
-# NVIDIA CORPORATION, its affiliates and licensors retain all intellectual
-# property and proprietary rights in and to this material, related
-# documentation and any modifications thereto. Any use, reproduction,
-# disclosure or distribution of this material and related documentation
-# without an express license agreement from NVIDIA CORPORATION or
-# its affiliates is strictly prohibited.
-
 set(GCC_MIN_VER 7.4)
 set(CLANG_MIN_VER 5.0)
 set(PREBUILT_LLVM_CLANG_VERSION 17.0.6)

author: Diego Caballero
patch:
commit 72de6de81eb398c7ed763d3641365ed77cdef01d
Author: Diego Caballero <dcaballero@nvidia.com>
Date:   Sun Dec 14 06:53:07 2025 +0000

    [LLVM-FIX] Breaking commit cfbb4cc3121 - 2025-10-31
    
    Fix breakage caused by LLVM commit:
        commit cfbb4cc31215d615f605466aef0bcfb42aa9faa5
        Author: Kazu Hirata <kazu@google.com>
        Date:   Fri Oct 31 09:42:07 2025 -0700
    
            [ADT] Remove ArrayRef(std::nullopt_t) (#165831)
---
 cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake                      | 2 +-
 include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Ops.td | 4 ++--
 lib/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/CudaTile.cpp         | 6 +++---
 3 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)

diff --git a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
index f65dad7..afec6b3 100644
--- a/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
+++ b/cmake/IncludeLLVM.cmake
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ macro(download_llvm_sources)
   include(FetchContent)
 
   set(LLVM_GIT_REPO "https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git")
-  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH 81b576e66bf223f7afc8a86463226cbf1bd480fd)
+  set(LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH cfbb4cc31215d615f605466aef0bcfb42aa9faa5)
   message(STATUS "Downloading LLVM sources from ${LLVM_GIT_REPO}@${LLVM_BUILD_COMMIT_HASH} to ${LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}")
 
   # Set FetchContent directories. SOURCE_DIR and BINARY_DIR and SUBBUILD_DIR
diff --git a/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Ops.td b/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Ops.td
index b24683d..e8d0273 100644
--- a/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Ops.td
+++ b/include/cuda_tile/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/Ops.td
@@ -1580,7 +1580,7 @@ def CudaTile_ForOp : CudaTileControlFlowOpDef<"for", "13.1", [
   let skipDefaultBuilders = 1;
   let builders = [
     OpBuilder<(ins "Value":$lowerBound, "Value":$upperBound, "Value":$step,
-      CArg<"ValueRange", "std::nullopt">:$initArgs,
+      CArg<"ValueRange", "{}">:$initArgs,
       CArg<"function_ref<void(OpBuilder &, Location, Value, ValueRange)>",
            "nullptr">)>
   ];
@@ -3528,7 +3528,7 @@ def CudaTile_ReturnOp : CudaTileControlFlowOpDef<"return", "13.1", [
   let arguments = (ins CudaTileArg<Variadic<AnyType>, "The values to return.", "13.1">:$operands);
 
   let builders = [OpBuilder<(ins), [{
-    build($_builder, $_state, std::nullopt);
+    build($_builder, $_state, ValueRange{});
   }]>];
 
   let assemblyFormat = [{
diff --git a/lib/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/CudaTile.cpp b/lib/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/CudaTile.cpp
index cf98e42..de4d71f 100644
--- a/lib/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/CudaTile.cpp
+++ b/lib/Dialect/CudaTile/IR/CudaTile.cpp
@@ -4205,9 +4205,9 @@ struct CudaTileinlinerInterface : public DialectInlinerInterface {
     // Create a new loop operation that will contain the inlined block, and
     // update the original return to use the loops results.
     builder.setInsertionPointToStart(&block);
-    auto loopOp = builder.create<LoopOp>(
-        block.front().getLoc(), returnOp->getOperandTypes(),
-        /*operands=*/ValueRange(), /*attributes=*/std::nullopt);
+    auto loopOp = builder.create<LoopOp>(block.front().getLoc(),
+                                         returnOp->getOperandTypes(),
+                                         /*operands=*/ValueRange());
     returnOp->setOperands(loopOp.getResults());
     returnOp->moveAfter(loopOp);
